autonomy_horizon: 45-120 min when gates and scope remain clear
auto_advance_rule: Continue to the next listed task only when the current task gate passes, evidence is updated, and no stop condition fires.
checkpoints: after JAT-020 template crate cargo gates pass
side_effect_policy: User authorized autonomous commits for this lane; commit only verified bounded work, do not push, and do not revert unrelated user changes.
stop_conditions: renderer dependency is required inside jellyflow-core or jellyflow-runtime
template needs wgpu, egui, Fret, winit, screenshots, or pixel tests
dirty unrelated files appear in the intended commit scope
result: Headless adapter template lane closed with non-workspace template crate, smoke integration, docs, workspace tests, template gates, no-Fret checks, JSON validation, and closeout evidence.
